name: drafting
description: Independent general-purpose skills for exploring, planning, executing, researching, challenging, and verifying work

interface.shortDescription: Independent skills for general knowledge work
interface.longDescription: General-purpose skills for exploring uncertain goals, planning and executing verifiable increments, conducting research, challenging ideas, validating results, and distilling lessons.
defaultPrompt: Clarify these requirements and turn them into a verifiable incremental plan
Challenge this plan and expose its weakest assumptions
Verify this deliverable against its requirements and acceptance criteria
